data.revised_prompt: photorealistic cinematic Japanese drama film still, environmental storytelling, professional book-summary video visual, warm natural light, quiet emotional realism, realistic lived-in details, 35mm lens, 16:9, no readable text. Scene 02/8, Desk and tools. Primary instruction: medium environmental shot inside the shop; wooden desk covered with blank envelopes, fountain pen, ink bottle, tea cup, red camellia vase; the woman writes at the desk in three-quarter side view, room details dominate the frame. Visible character rule: one East Asian woman, early 30s, short black bob haircut, cream cardigan, white top, dark skirt; exactly one visible person, never a close-up portrait, never looking directly at camera. Emotional theme: letters and tools carry unsaid feelings. Blank paper only, no readable words.
